response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with a strong match to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent hands-on work with AI agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, which directly aligns with the role's AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, databases, DevOps, and architecture, with evidence of craftsmanship practices like TDD and CI/CD.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React stack with 6+ years
Current AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, teaching)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure for secondary stack
Cloud experience skews AWS-only with no Kubernetes specifics on primary roles
